comment: VCSL Baroque Recorder family — Alto preferred (mid-range / treble),
then Soprano, Tenor, Bass as fallbacks to cover the keyboard. Sustain
articulation only (no SusVib/Staccato). Sparse non-chromatic sampling
per recorder size; the analyzer will fetch whatever exists and pick at
4-semitone spacing. Mixing recorder sizes may produce timbral seams
between picks — flag during audition. Generated by
